evidence_rea: You can also request that we rectify or erase any personal data we hold about you.
evidence_reg: the existence of the right to request from the controller rectification or erasure of personal data
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA states a right to request rectification or erasure, which is consistent with the REG text on the existence of that right; the REA is narrower because it does not mention restriction or objection, but omission alone is not a deviation.

evidence_rea: You can also request that we rectify or erase any personal data we hold about you.
evidence_reg: the existence of the right to request from the controller access to and rectification or erasure of personal data
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA aligns with the REG insofar as both expressly cover requesting rectification or erasure; missing references to access, restriction, objection, and portability are omissions, not quote-supported conflicts.

evidence_rea: You can also request that we rectify or erase any personal data we hold about you.
evidence_reg: the existence of the right to request from the controller access to and rectification or erasure of personal data
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA communicates the right to request rectification or erasure, matching the relevant part of the REG; although the REG includes additional rights and timing language, the REA does not directly contradict them.
